name: @tank/tailwind
description: Production Tailwind CSS patterns and component recipes. Covers responsive design (mobile-first breakpoints, container queries), component recipes (buttons, cards, forms, navigation, modals), dark mode strategies, custom theme configuration, plugin development, animation utilities, arbitrary values, and CSS variable integration. Includes shadcn/ui patterns. Synthesized from Tailwind CSS official docs, Refactoring UI (Wathan/Schoger), and community patterns. Triggers: tailwind, CSS, utility class, responsive, dark mode, theme, plugin, animation, shadow, gradient, flex, grid, container query, breakpoint, hover, focus, arbitrary value, shadcn, component styling, design tokens.
